meta.title: GCB Lite — Try in your browser
meta.description: A live WordPress install in your browser with the gcb-lite plugin and four demo blocks (hero, feature trio + items, CTA). Click any block to see the typed-field Inspector on the right.
meta.author: wordpress-gcb

options.blogdescription: Try the gcb-lite plugin without installing anything

steps.code:
<?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; flush_rewrite_rules(true); $content = '<!-- wp:gcb/demo-hero {"eyebrow":"Try it now","heading":"You're editing WordPress in your browser.","body":"This whole WordPress install is running in WASM inside your tab. The gcb-lite plugin and four demo blocks are pre-installed. Click any block below to see the typed-field Inspector on the right.","cta":{"url":"https://github.com/wordpress-gcb/gutenberg-control-blocks-lite","text":"View the plugin on GitHub","opensInNewTab":true}} /-->' . "

" . '<!-- wp:gcb/demo-feature-trio -->' . "
" . '<!-- wp:gcb/demo-feature-item {"title":"Typed fields","body":"Declare Inspector controls in JSON. The plugin generates WP attributes with correct types and defaults."} /-->' . "
" . '<!-- wp:gcb/demo-feature-item {"title":"PHP or React render","body":"Per-block choice. render.php for simple cases, a React component on your frontend for the rich ones."} /-->' . "
" . '<!-- wp:gcb/demo-feature-item {"title":"Editor parity","body":"The editor preview is the same component that ships to production. No edit.js to maintain in parallel."} /-->' . "
" . '<!-- /wp:gcb/demo-feature-trio -->' . "

" . '<!-- wp:gcb/demo-cta {"heading":"Ready to use it for real?","body":"Install the plugin on a WordPress site you control. Pair with the gcb-next-starter for the headless React story.","link":{"url":"https://github.com/wordpress-gcb/gutenberg-control-blocks-lite#quick-start","text":"Read the quick start","opensInNewTab":true}} /-->'; wp_update_post(['ID' => 2, 'post_title' => 'GCB Lite Demo', 'post_content' => $content, 'post_status' => 'publish']);
